---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-hero">
  <div class="content-section" style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;">
    <p class="eyebrow">About</p>
    <h1 style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Anurita Sharma</h1>
    <p style="color:#4A6A88;font-size:0.95rem;">Policy Strategist · Program Manager · Georgetown University</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Bio + Skills -->
<div class="content-section">
  <div class="grid-2" style="gap:2.5rem;align-items:start;">
    
    <div>
      <div class="hero-avatar" style="margin-bottom:1rem;width:80px;height:80px;font-size:1.4rem;">AS</div>
      <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:#2C4A66;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:1rem;">
        I've spent nine years at the intersection of research and action — translating evidence 
        into programs that serve real people. I started in county-level health administration, 
        moved into federal evaluation work, and now work across the public and nonprofit sectors 
        on policy strategy and program design.
      </p>
      <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:#2C4A66;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:1rem;">
        I believe the best policy work is invisible — it just looks like things finally working. 
        My approach is rigorous on the evidence side and deeply human on the implementation side.
      </p>
      <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:#2C4A66;line-height:1.8;">
        At Georgetown I study public policy with a focus on program evaluation, causal inference, 
        and applied data analytics — building the methodological depth to match the field experience.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div>
      <div class="section-divider">Skills &amp; tools</div>

      <div class="skills-group">
        <div class="skills-group-name">Analysis &amp; data</div>
        <div class="pills-row">
          <span class="pill pill-blue">Stata</span>
          <span class="pill pill-blue">R / Tidyverse</span>
          <span class="pill pill-blue">Python</span>
          <span class="pill pill-blue">ArcGIS / spmap</span>
          <span class="pill pill-blue">Power BI</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="skills-group">
        <div class="skills-group-name">Evaluation &amp; causal inference</div>
        <div class="pills-row">
          <span class="pill pill-sky">RCT design</span>
          <span class="pill pill-sky">Monte Carlo simulation</span>
          <span class="pill pill-sky">DAG reasoning</span>
          <span class="pill pill-sky">Mixed methods</span>
          <span class="pill pill-sky">Power analysis</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="skills-group">
        <div class="skills-group-name">Communication &amp; policy</div>
        <div class="pills-row">
          <span class="pill pill-teal">Policy briefs</span>
          <span class="pill pill-teal">Quarto / R Markdown</span>
          <span class="pill pill-teal">Public testimony</span>
          <span class="pill pill-teal">Evidence synthesis</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="skills-group">
        <div class="skills-group-name">Program management</div>
        <div class="pills-row">
          <span class="pill pill-slate">Federal grants</span>
          <span class="pill pill-slate">Budget oversight</span>
          <span class="pill pill-slate">Stakeholder engagement</span>
          <span class="pill pill-slate">Cross-sector partnerships</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Experience Timeline -->
<div style="background:#F7FAFE;border-top:1px solid #D0DFF0;border-bottom:1px solid #D0DFF0;">
  <div class="content-section">
    <div class="section-divider">Experience</div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-dot-col"><div class="tl-dot"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
      <div>
        <div class="tl-role">MPP Candidate — Public Policy & Data Analytics</div>
        <div class="tl-org">Georgetown University · McCourt School of Public Policy</div>
        <div class="tl-years">2025 – present</div>
        <div class="tl-desc">Specializing in program evaluation, causal inference, and applied statistics. Coursework in econometrics, spatial analysis, and evidence-based policy design.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-dot-col"><div class="tl-dot" style="background:#6ECDC5;"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
      <div>
        <div class="tl-role">Senior Policy Strategist</div>
        <div class="tl-org">Mathematica Policy Research</div>
        <div class="tl-years">2022 – 2024</div>
        <div class="tl-desc">Led evaluation and strategy engagements for federal health and workforce clients. Managed $4M+ project portfolio and a team of 6 analysts. Produced policy briefs informing HHS and DOL program design.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-dot-col"><div class="tl-dot" style="background:#8BBFE8;"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
      <div>
        <div class="tl-role">Program Evaluator</div>
        <div class="tl-org">Urban Institute</div>
        <div class="tl-years">2019 – 2022</div>
        <div class="tl-desc">Designed and conducted mixed-methods evaluations of DOL and HHS grant programs. Co-authored 7 peer-reviewed publications. Developed evaluation frameworks adopted across 3 federal agencies.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-dot-col"><div class="tl-dot" style="background:#B8D8F8;"></div></div>
      <div>
        <div class="tl-role">Policy Analyst</div>
        <div class="tl-org">Cook County Dept. of Public Health</div>
        <div class="tl-years">2016 – 2019</div>
        <div class="tl-desc">Developed and tracked indicators for community health improvement plan. Coordinated across 12 departments and 40+ community organizations. First role in government after graduate school.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Education -->
<div class="content-section">
  <div class="section-divider">Education</div>
  <div class="grid-2">
    <div style="background:#DAEEFF;border-radius:12px;padding:1.2rem;">
      <div style="font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#2E7DBF;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Current</div>
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;color:#1A3A5C;margin-bottom:0.2rem;">Master of Public Policy</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#4A6A88;">Georgetown University · McCourt School</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#8AA4C0;">2025 – 2027</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#F7FAFE;border:1px solid #D0DFF0;border-radius:12px;padding:1.2rem;">
      <div style="font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8AA4C0;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Undergraduate</div>
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;color:#1A3A5C;margin-bottom:0.2rem;">B.A. Economics &amp; Political Science</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#4A6A88;">University of Delhi</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#8AA4C0;">2012 – 2016</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
